title: Developer Notice channel is live
body:
Hi! This is the new in-app channel for short notes from the developer. You'll see a pulsing dot in the sidebar next to **Developer Notice** when there's something new. Click the row to read; the dot goes away once you do.

Features supported in notice bodies:

- **Bold**, *italic*, and `inline code`
- Bullet lists
- [Links](https://github.com/ZoneMinder/zmNinjaNg) that open in a new tab

Critical notices (security advisories, urgent action) also surface as a banner at the top of the app until dismissed.
